title: Tafsir Ibn Kathir (Vol 1)
author: Ibn Kathir
description: The most widely used classical Tafsir. Vol 1 covers Surah Al-Fatiha and the beginning of Al-Baqarah.

title: Riyadus Salihin
author: Imam Al-Nawawi
description: Gardens of the Righteous — a collection of authentic hadiths on Islamic conduct and character.

title: Bulugh Al-Maram
author: Ibn Hajar Al-Asqalani
description: Attainment of the Objective — hadiths covering Islamic jurisprudence and rulings.

title: Al-Aqeedah Al-Wasitiyyah
author: Ibn Taymiyyah
description: A concise treatise on the creed of Ahlus Sunnah wal Jama'ah regarding Allah's names and attributes.

title: The Sealed Nectar (Ar-Raheeq Al-Makhtum)
author: Safi-ur-Rahman Al-Mubarakpuri
description: Award-winning biography of Prophet Muhammad ﷺ. Clear, detailed, and comprehensive.

title: Madinah Arabic Book 1
author: Dr. V. Abdur Rahim
description: The foundational textbook of the famous Madinah Arabic course. Starts from the very basics.
